// reporters: Tier2ReporterDecl.java.txt#InternalLog.logInternal
package com.other;

import com.consumer.x.*;

// Wildcard import (fail closed): a wildcard does not establish source-only that
// InternalLog comes from com.consumer.x, so the bare qualifier falls to this
// file's own package (com.other) and does not match the declaration.
class Tier2Wildcard {
    void wildcardIsNotEnough() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            InternalLog.logInternal("boom", e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
